items.name: Golden Spirit Katana
items.description: Forged from the purest gold and blessed by ancient spirits, this rare katana glows with a radiant light. The Golden Spirit is not just a weapon but a symbol of unparalleled mastery and honor. Its flawless blade cuts through darkness, embodying the power and elegance of a true warrior.
